name: evomtrs-site
description: EVOMTRS static marketing site build scripts

scripts.build:example: env -i PATH="$PATH" EVOMTRS_ALLOW_PREVIEW_PLACEHOLDERS=1 python3 scripts/render_site.py public dist --env-file .env.example
scripts.verify:placeholder-containment: env -i PATH="$PATH" python3 scripts/render_site.py public /tmp/evomtrs-placeholder-containment-dist --env-file .env.example && python3 scripts/verify_placeholder_containment.py /tmp/evomtrs-placeholder-containment-dist
scripts.verify:launch-local: npm run build:example && npm run verify:static && npm run verify:launch-values
scripts.verify: npm run build:example && npm run verify:static && npm run verify:deploy-posture && npm run verify:placeholder-containment
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 8080
scripts.deploy: node -e "console.error('GitHub Pages is the canonical production target; deploy approval is required before running the manual workflow.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.legacy:cf:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788
scripts.legacy:cf:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
